sql.query: SELECT t.id,t.workflowId,t.workflowStageId,t.taskName,t.description,t.status,t.priority,t.isRequired,t.dueDate,t.startedDate,t.completedDate,ws.stageName,ws.sortOrder AS stageSortOrder,u.displayName AS assignedUserName,tm.teamName AS assignedTeamName,r.roleName AS assignedRoleName,CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_task_dependencies d INNER JOIN tbl_tasks p ON p.id=d.dependsOnTaskId AND p.workflowId=t.workflowId AND p.tenantId=t.tenantId WHERE d.taskId=t.id AND d.workflowId=t.workflowId AND d.tenantId=t.tenantId AND ((d.dependencyType IN ('finish_to_start','blocking') AND p.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled')) OR (d.dependencyType='start_to_start' AND p.status='not_started'))) AS UNSIGNED) AS startBlockerCount,CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_task_dependencies d INNER JOIN tbl_tasks p ON p.id=d.dependsOnTaskId AND p.workflowId=t.workflowId AND p.tenantId=t.tenantId WHERE d.taskId=t.id AND d.workflowId=t.workflowId AND d.tenantId=t.tenantId AND d.dependencyType='finish_to_finish' AND p.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled')) AS UNSIGNED) AS finishBlockerCount,(SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT p.taskName ORDER BY p.id SEPARATOR ', ') FROM tbl_task_dependencies d INNER JOIN tbl_tasks p ON p.id=d.dependsOnTaskId AND p.workflowId=t.workflowId AND p.tenantId=t.tenantId WHERE d.taskId=t.id AND d.workflowId=t.workflowId AND d.tenantId=t.tenantId AND ((d.dependencyType IN ('finish_to_start','blocking','finish_to_finish') AND p.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled')) OR (d.dependencyType='start_to_start' AND p.status='not_started'))) AS blockerNames FROM tbl_tasks t INNER JOIN tbl_workflows w ON w.id=t.workflowId AND w.tenantId=t.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_workflow_stages ws ON ws.id=t.workflowStageId AND ws.tenantId=t.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_users u ON u.id=t.assignedToUserId LEFT JOIN tbl_teams tm ON tm.id=t.assignedToTeamId AND tm.tenantId=t.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_roles r ON r.id=t.assignedToRoleId WHERE t.workflowId=:workflowId AND t.tenantId=:tenantId ORDER BY ws.sortOrder,t.id
